name: FMD immunosenescence prefrail elderly registry
summary: Unknown-status randomized single-masked phase 1/2 trial of a ProLon fasting-mimicking diet intervention in elderly frailty, inflammation, and immune-system-disorder context, with safety, feasibility, flu-vaccine immune response, and frailty-prevention endpoints.
population: Estimated 40 elderly participants in frailty, inflammation, and immune-system-disorder context

trial_details.watch_status_reason: Estimated completion was in late 2022 and the June 15, 2026 registry check still found no posted results; remove from active anticipation but retain as late no-results context.
trial_details.expected_results_window: The registry lists estimated completion in December 2022, unknown overall status, and no posted results in the June 11, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: Unknown-status stale registry context, not evidence of benefit.
trial_details.why_it_matters: The study sits at the autophagy, immune-rejuvenation, and frailty boundary; its stale no-results status should remain visible without upgrading FMD evidence.
